description: Entry-level production deployment for a focused analytics team with limited concurrent users and moderate data volumes. Suitable for a single Viya offering (e.g., Visual Analytics or Visual Statistics) with batch processing and light interactive use.
useCases: Small-team self-service analytics and reporting (SAS Visual Analytics)
Initial model development and deployment (Model Studio + Model Manager)
Single-offering deployment with batch processing windows
Department-level fraud scoring with low transaction volumes
Exploratory analytics with datasets under 250 GB on disk
dataVolume: Up to 250 GB on disk / up to 75 GB lifted into memory
cpuPerNode: Varies by cloud provider — refer to official SAS sizing guide for exact instance types
ramPerNode: Sized for CAS in-memory processing of target dataset
storage: SSD/NVMe recommended for SASWORK and CAS DISK CACHE. NFS for shared home directories.
network: Accelerated networking required for CAS and Compute nodes. All instances in same placement group.
estimatedMonthlyCost: Contact SAS/VST ECS for cloud cost estimate based on your provider and region
hadrNotes: Single availability zone acceptable. Baseline (min_nodes) for steady-state, auto-scale to max_nodes for peak workloads.
cloudVsOnprem: Available on AWS (EKS), Azure (AKS), Google Cloud (GKE), and Red Hat OpenShift. Cloud recommended for auto-scaling flexibility.
viyaTier: SAS Viya (Standard) — includes Visual Analytics, Visual Statistics, Visual Data Mining & ML, Model Studio, Model Manager
typicalCustomers: Small analytics teams, single-department deployments, organizations starting their Viya journey
